steps.title: Spot the parenthetical interruption
steps.content: The relative clause starting with 'that' contains a parenthetical interruption: the phrase 'through community involvement and scientific ______' breaks off before the clause continues with 'aim to bring'.

steps.title: Apply the pairing rule
steps.content:
The rule is that paired em-dashes set off parenthetical interruptions. 'Study—' provides the closing dash required to match the opening dash after 'that—'.

Choices A, C, and D use a comma, colon, or nothing respectively, failing to close the parenthetical.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
